artifact_family_classes.description: Core governance artifacts that must be preserved as long as the task is open or under audit: contracts, scopes, reports, audit packets, ChatGPT audits.
Runtime execution evidence recorded during live Claude Code runs: launches, preflights, results, summaries, runs, executions.
Multi-agent orchestration manifests, executor packets, and GitHub mutation evidence.
Operational ledger tracking all SpecBridge operations end-to-end.
Derived and index artifacts that are regenerated on demand: MCP resources, artifact inventory, branch inventory, branch cleanup policy evaluation, artifact retention policy evaluation.

future_activation_requirements: policy_status must be changed from draft to active
enforcement must be changed from none to a defined enforcement mode
explicit operator authorization must be recorded in the operator decision registry
CI must pass with the active policy in force
review gate must pass before any cleanup action is taken
blocked_actions: make network calls from the artifact retention policy command
enforce this policy while status is draft
enforce this policy while enforcement is none
